utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six of these items. Each one is fully specified with all relevant details—property has type, location, price, size, layout, condo fees, and features; financing includes method, down payment, rate, term, closing costs, and monthly estimate; legal_services includes provider, cost, duration, and included services; moving_services includes service level, cost, packing/unpacking, and flexibility; setup_services includes type, cost, included services, and timeline; total_budget includes cost breakdown and notes. Therefore, all six items are covered and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose a 1-bedroom modern condo in downtown Toronto priced at CAD 460,000. Among the available purchase options, the closest match by characteristics (modern design, price within the CAD 420–480K range, open concept, creative workspace potential) is 'New Build' (price CAD 480K, rating 10). The financing method chosen was a mortgage with 20% down payment, which corresponds to the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 8) since the 'First-Time Buyer' scheme typically uses 10% down payment. The legal provider 'service_option2' costs CAD 800, aligning with the 'Basic Legal Package' (price CAD 800, rating 9). The moving service is labeled 'basic' with a cost of CAD 150, matching 'Self-Move' (rating 6). The utility setup chosen is 'basic' costing CAD 120, which corresponds to 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6).

final_package_text:
{
  "property": {
    "type": "1-bedroom modern condo",
    "location": "Toronto (downtown)",
    "price": 460000,
    "size_sqft": 807,
    "layout": "open concept",
    "condo_fees_monthly": 410,
    "features": ["modern development", "creative workspace potential"]
  },

    "method": "mortgage",
    "down_payment": 92000,
    "down_payment_percentage": 20,
    "interest_rate": 5.1,
    "term_years": 25,

    "estimated_monthly_payment": "approx. 2275 CAD (principal + interest)"
  },
  "legal_services": {
    "provider": "service_option2",
    "cost": 800,
    "duration_days": 28,
    "included": ["contract review", "title search", "registration", "disbursements"]
  },
  "moving_services": {
    "service_level": "basic",
    "cost": 150,
    "packing_included": false,
    "unpacking_included": false,
    "timeline_flexibility": "very flexible"
  },
  "setup_services": {

    "services_included": ["electricity", "gas", "water"],
    "setup_timeline_days": 3
  },
  "total_budget": {

    "down_payment": 92000,
    "closing_costs": 1000,
    "legal": 800,
    "moving": 150,
    "utilities_setup": 120,
    "total_initial_outlay": 92200,

  }
